name: 攻上凌霄宝殿
short_description: This is a highly strategic turn-based combat game. Players can often defeat stronger opponents with their own understanding and operation skills, which brings them a great sense of accomplishment. There are numerous combinations of gameplay styles and a battle pet system in the game.
detailed_description:
This is an RPG (Role-Playing Game) adapted from one of China's Four Great Classical Novels, Journey to the West.

Players will take on the roles of Tang Sanzang and his four disciples, as well as various demon kings and immortals, and go through layers of trials to enhance themselves, and ultimately break the grip of tyranny.

The game features a very rich combat system, a battle pet system, and an equipment system. There are a large number of professional skills, meridians, and passive abilities.

Each player can assemble a unique lineup and gameplay style of their own. The bosses in the game have excellent interaction mechanisms, making the battles extremely thrilling and satisfying.

There are also various hidden Easter eggs in the game for players to discover on their own.
